name: Chocolate Walnut Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
2. Thaw dough and let rise until twice its original size.
3. Punch down the dough and roll it out to a rectangle measuring 6 x 12 inches.
4. Sprinkle the chocolate and chopped walnuts evenly along the center of the dough, leaving about an inch on all sides.
5. Fold in the long sides of the dough towards the center and press to seal.
6. Place the dough seam-side down into a stoneware loaf pan.
7. Spread honey evenly over the top of the dough.
8. Bake for 50-60 minutes until the crust is golden brown.
9. Allow the bread to cool slightly in the pan.
10. Carefully remove the bread from the pan and let it cool an additional 10-15 minutes before slicing.
